content: agent1: implementing batch_size param for multiple options (Click). Plan to touch src/click/core.py (Option class, info_dict, process_value) and src/click/types.py. Will keep changes scoped; will ping before major structural edits.

agent1: heads up — I will edit Option.__init__ (new batch_size param + validation), Option.to_info_dict (adding batch_size key), and add an Option.process_value override for batching multiple values. I won't touch Option.get_default/get_help_record or Command.main(). Will ping when done so you can rebase your info_dict edits on top if needed.

agent1: done. Edited src/click/core.py only — added batch_size to Option.__init__ (validation: ValueError if negative, TypeError if used without multiple), added batch_size to Option.to_info_dict (always present, defaults None), and added Option.process_value override that chunks multiple values into an iterator of tuples via a new _batch_values() helper. Did not touch get_default/get_help_record/Command.main. Note: this breaks tests/test_info_dict.py's exact-dict-equality assertions (now include batch_size) — expected fallout of the spec, left tests unmodified per instructions.
